subject: Cannot login to my account
description: I have been trying to login for the past hour but keep getting an error message. My password should be correct as I just reset it yesterday.

subject: Application crashes when uploading files
description: The application crashes every time I try to upload a file larger than 5MB. This is blocking my work completely.

subject: Invoice shows wrong amount
description: My latest invoice shows $299 but I should only be charged $199 based on my subscription plan. Please correct this immediately.

subject: Feature request for dark mode
description: Would be great if the application supported dark mode. It would be easier on the eyes when working late.

subject: Bug in export functionality
description: When I export data to CSV the date format is incorrect. Steps to reproduce: 1. Go to reports 2. Click export 3. Open CSV

subject: Password reset not working
description: I requested a password reset email but never received it. I have checked spam folder as well. My email is definitely correct.

subject: Slow performance on dashboard
description: The dashboard takes over 30 seconds to load. This started happening after the last update. Very frustrating.

subject: Cancel my subscription
description: I would like to cancel my subscription effective immediately. Please confirm the cancellation and any refund due.

subject: Add API rate limiting info
description: It would be helpful to have documentation about API rate limits. Currently there is no information about this.

subject: Data not syncing between devices
description: My data is not syncing properly between my laptop and mobile device. I made changes on laptop but they do not appear on mobile.

subject: Two-factor authentication issue
description: Cannot complete two-factor authentication. The codes from my authenticator app are not being accepted.

subject: Server error when saving
description: Getting a 500 server error when trying to save my project. This has been happening intermittently for two days.

subject: Refund request for double charge
description: I was charged twice for my monthly subscription. Please refund the duplicate charge of $49.99.

subject: Calendar integration request
description: Would love to see Google Calendar integration. This would help me manage my schedule much better.

subject: Search returns wrong results
description: When I search for specific terms the results are completely unrelated. This makes finding documents impossible.

subject: Account locked after failed attempts
description: My account got locked after entering wrong password. I need to access it urgently for a client presentation.

subject: Memory leak in application
description: The application memory usage keeps growing until it crashes. Have to restart every few hours.

subject: Question about pricing tiers
description: Can you explain the difference between Professional and Enterprise pricing tiers? The website is not clear.

subject: Keyboard shortcuts feature
description: Adding keyboard shortcuts would greatly improve productivity. Especially for common actions like save and export.

subject: Notification emails not arriving
description: I am not receiving any notification emails even though they are enabled in settings. Started about a week ago.

subject: SSO login not working
description: Single sign-on with our company Microsoft account is failing. Getting redirect error after authentication.

subject: API timeout errors
description: Getting timeout errors when calling the REST API. Response times are over 60 seconds for simple queries.

subject: Dispute transaction
description: I need to dispute a transaction from last month. The service was not as described and I want my money back.

subject: Mobile app feature request
description: The mobile app is missing the report generation feature. Would be very useful to have this on the go.

subject: Images not displaying correctly
description: Some images in my documents are showing as broken links. The images were uploaded successfully before.

subject: Cannot change email address
description: The option to change my email address is grayed out. I need to update it to my new company email.

subject: File upload size limit too small
description: The current 10MB file upload limit is too restrictive. Many of our documents are larger than this.

subject: Annual billing option
description: Do you offer annual billing with a discount? I would prefer to pay yearly instead of monthly.

subject: Bulk export feature
description: Need ability to export all data at once rather than page by page. Very time consuming currently.

subject: Form validation error
description: Getting validation error on the form even though all required fields are filled in correctly. Cannot submit.

subject: Profile picture not updating
description: I uploaded a new profile picture but it still shows the old one. Cleared cache but no change.

subject: Database connection errors
description: Seeing intermittent database connection errors in the logs. Some queries are failing randomly.

subject: Payment method update
description: Need to update my payment method from credit card to PayPal. Cannot find the option in settings.

subject: Real-time collaboration feature
description: Would be amazing to have real-time collaboration like Google Docs. Multiple users editing simultaneously.

subject: Print layout issues
description: When printing reports the layout is completely messed up. Headers and footers are overlapping content.

subject: Session expiring too quickly
description: My session expires after just 10 minutes of inactivity. Need longer timeout for complex work.

subject: SSL certificate warning
description: Getting SSL certificate warning when accessing the application. Certificate seems to have expired.

subject: Tax invoice needed
description: I need a proper tax invoice for my records. The current receipt does not include the required tax details.

subject: Widget customization
description: Would like to be able to customize the dashboard widgets. Move them around and resize them.

subject: Sorting not working correctly
description: The sort by date function is sorting alphabetically instead of chronologically. Very confusing.

subject: Cannot delete old projects
description: There is no option to delete old projects. My account is cluttered with completed work from years ago.

subject: Slow page transitions
description: Page transitions are very slow even with fast internet. Takes 5-10 seconds to navigate between pages.

subject: Upgrade confusion
description: Tried to upgrade my plan but the process is confusing. Not sure if the upgrade went through.

subject: Offline mode request
description: Would be great to have offline mode so I can work without internet connection occasionally.

subject: Copy paste not working
description: Cannot copy and paste text within the application. Right-click menu does not appear.

subject: Multi-language account setting
description: Need to set my account language to Spanish. Cannot find the language settings anywhere.

subject: High CPU usage
description: The application is using 100 percent CPU even when idle. Makes my laptop run hot and slow.

subject: Promo code not applying
description: Tried to apply promo code SAVE20 but it says invalid. The code should be valid until end of month.

subject: Template library feature
description: Having a library of templates would save a lot of time. Currently have to start from scratch each time.

subject: Undo function not working
description: The undo button does not restore deleted content. Lost important work because of this bug.
